channel.title: Distributed Training on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Distributed Training on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: Aliyun PAI (3): PAI-DLC — Distributed Training Without the Cluster Pain
item.description: A DSW notebook is for one engineer on one GPU. The moment you need eight GPUs across two nodes, or the moment training runs longer than the eight hours you’ll keep the tab open, you switch to DLC. DLC is PAI’s job-submission front-end for a managed Kubernetes cluster: you describe what you want (image, command, resources, data mounts), DLC schedules pods, runs them to completion, persists logs, and tells you what happened. The docs call this Deep Learning Containers; we just say “DLC job”.
